urdu transliteration text: Hai aaj fatemah se , Mawlaa Ali ki Shaahdi
english translation text: Today is the marriage of Bibi Fatimah (A.S) & Mola Ali (A.S)

urdu transliteration text: Jibreel Murtaza ko Dulhaa benaa rahe hai
english translation text: Angel Jibraeel is preparing Imam Ali as a groom.

urdu transliteration text:
Sab arsh farsh waaleh,
khushiyaa manaa rahe hai
english translation text: All on earth and heaven are celebrating this happy occasion

urdu transliteration text: Baadeh sabaah khushi mei itraa ke chal rahi haiTehzeeb aaj phir se karwat badel rahi hai
english translation text: Morning, today, is walking around with a happy attitudeThe daily norms are taking a turn again today, such that

urdu transliteration text: Jannat sajaa ne waaleh haa jannat sajaa ne waalehDuniyaa sajaa rahe hai
english translation text: The decorators of heavenAre decorating the world

urdu transliteration text: Dul dul sawaaar mawlaa padal rewaa dewaa haiBaraatiyo mei shaamil nabiyo ka karawaa hai
english translation text:
The master who normally rode on a horse is walking
Amongst the guests present, is a caravan of prophets

urdu transliteration text:
Kerneh ko khar makdum
sarkaar aah rehe hai
english translation text: The Master of all the prophets (Prophet Muhammad) is coming to welcome them

urdu transliteration text: Mehmaa newaaziyo mei hai mehve shaahe bathaKhaneh ki zimeh daari oureh hai ummeh salmaa
english translation text: H.Abu Talib is busy taking care of the prophetsUmme Salma (wife of the prophet) is responsible for the food

urdu transliteration text:
lyas khirz sab ko
sharbat pilaa rehe hai
Prophet Ilyas and Khizr are serving sharbat to everyone
Mikdaad ho ke qambar salmaan hoya misumHawaa ho ya ke saraa fizaa ho ya ke Maryam
english translation text: Miqdad or Qambar, Salman or MeasumHawa or Sara, Fiza or Maryam

urdu transliteration text:
Sehraa ali wali ka sab mil ke gaa rehe hai
Everyone is reciting the wedding eulogy together
Kitnaa hasi hai manzar is waqt ruksati kaquran ker rehaa hai dulhan ke sar pe saayaa
english translation text: How beautiful is this sight, the time of the brides departureThe Quran is providing shade over the head of the bride

urdu transliteration text:
Salmaan aur abuzar
doli utha rahe hai
english translation text: Salman and Abuzar, are lifting the palanquin
